command.text: select case when rtrim(val) = '1' then '1' else '0' end as view_index from options where name = 'm_gt_dvcs'

field.name: ma_dvcs
field.check: ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs where status = '1')⩓ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from dmdvcsks where year(ngay_ks) >= @startYear)⩓not exists(select 1 from xcdloaiytdd b where @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and @@table.loai_yt = b.loai_yt and @@table.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and @@table.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and @@table.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and b.nam = @startYear and b.ky = 0) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_new = 1)⩓exists(select 1 from xcdloaiytdd b where @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and @@table.loai_yt = b.loai_yt and @@table.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and @@table.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and @@table.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and b.nam = @startYear and b.ky = 0) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_edit = 1)
field.condition: if @costUnit = '1' begin⩓if @costUnit = '1' begin⩓if @costUnit = '1' begin if @@admin <> 1 begin⩓if @costUnit = '1' begin if @@admin <> 1 begin if @type = '1' begin

field.name: loai_yt
field.check: loai_yt not in (select ma_loai from xdmloaiyt)

field.name: ma_sp
field.check: ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)

field.name: loai_yt
field.check: loai_yt not in (select ma_loai from xdmloaiyt)

field.name: ma_sp
field.check: ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)

field.name: ma_dvcs
field.check: ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs where status = '1')⩓ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from dmdvcsks where year(ngay_ks) >= @startYear)⩓not exists(select 1 from xcdloaiytdd b where @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and @@table.loai_yt = b.loai_yt and @@table.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and @@table.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and @@table.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and b.nam = @startYear and b.ky = 0) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_new = 1)⩓exists(select 1 from xcdloaiytdd b where @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and @@table.loai_yt = b.loai_yt and @@table.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and @@table.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and @@table.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and b.nam = @startYear and b.ky = 0) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_edit = 1)
field.condition: if @costUnit = '1' begin⩓if @costUnit = '1' begin⩓if @costUnit = '1' begin if @@admin <> 1 begin⩓if @costUnit = '1' begin if @@admin <> 1 begin if @type = '1' begin

processing.text:
if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'COOpeningWIPQuantity', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @inputDept varchar(8), @inputMO varchar(8), @maxLength int, @startYear int, @r int, @costUnit char(1)
select @startYear = nam_bd from dmstt select @inputDept = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'x_dt_bp' select @inputMO = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'x_dt_lsx' select @costUnit = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_gt_dvcs' select @maxLength = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = 'xcdloaiytdd' and column_name = 'so_lsx'
-- Update update @@table set so_lsx = space(@maxLength - len(rtrim(so_lsx))) + rtrim(so_lsx)
-- Delete if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from xcdloaiytdd b where a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.loai_yt = b.loai_yt and a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and b.nam = @startYear and b.ky = 0)
-- Checking &Checking; &CheckCostingUnit;
-- Gather select a.* into #k from @@table a join xcdloaiytdd b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.loai_yt = b.loai_yt and a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.so_lsx = b.so_lsx where b.nam = @startYear and b.ky = 0 delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.loai_yt = b.loai_yt and a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.so_lsx = b.so_lsx)
-- Insert &Inserting;
-- Update if @type = '1' &Updating; and a.nam = @startYear and a.ky = 0
